# Generated by tools/generate_slides_menu.py
show

segment S:Initialize
    setup {
        F:home.BG
    } setup_done {
        activate_segment S:home ;
    }
;

segment S:home
    active {
        F:home.BG
        F:home.Buttons
    } setup {
        F:home.BG
        F:home.Buttons
    } rc_handlers {
        R:home
    }
;

segment S:chapters
    active {
        F:chapters.BG
        F:chapters.Buttons
    } setup {
        F:chapters.BG
        F:chapters.Buttons
    } rc_handlers {
        R:chapters
    }
;

segment S:extras
    active {
        F:extras.BG
        F:extras.Buttons
    } setup {
        F:extras.BG
        F:extras.Buttons
    } rc_handlers {
        R:extras
    }
;

feature fixed_image F:home.BG 0 0 "assets/home_bg.png" ;
feature fixed_image F:home.chapters.Selected 70 513 "assets/home_chapters_selected.png" ;
feature fixed_image F:home.chapters.Activated 70 513 "assets/home_chapters_activated.png" ;
feature fixed_image F:home.extras.Selected 390 513 "assets/home_extras_selected.png" ;
feature fixed_image F:home.extras.Activated 390 513 "assets/home_extras_activated.png" ;
feature fixed_image F:home.play.Selected 710 513 "assets/home_play_selected.png" ;
feature fixed_image F:home.play.Activated 710 513 "assets/home_play_activated.png" ;

feature fixed_image F:chapters.BG 0 0 "assets/chapters_bg.png" ;
feature fixed_image F:chapters.ch1.Selected 70 477 "assets/chapters_ch1_selected.png" ;
feature fixed_image F:chapters.ch1.Activated 70 477 "assets/chapters_ch1_activated.png" ;
feature fixed_image F:chapters.ch2.Selected 337 477 "assets/chapters_ch2_selected.png" ;
feature fixed_image F:chapters.ch2.Activated 337 477 "assets/chapters_ch2_activated.png" ;
feature fixed_image F:chapters.home.Selected 870 563 "assets/chapters_home_selected.png" ;
feature fixed_image F:chapters.home.Activated 870 563 "assets/chapters_home_activated.png" ;

feature fixed_image F:extras.BG 0 0 "assets/extras_bg.png" ;
feature fixed_image F:extras.gallery.Selected 70 477 "assets/extras_gallery_selected.png" ;
feature fixed_image F:extras.gallery.Activated 70 477 "assets/extras_gallery_activated.png" ;
feature fixed_image F:extras.credits.Selected 337 477 "assets/extras_credits_selected.png" ;
feature fixed_image F:extras.credits.Activated 337 477 "assets/extras_credits_activated.png" ;
feature fixed_image F:extras.home.Selected 870 563 "assets/extras_home_selected.png" ;
feature fixed_image F:extras.home.Activated 870 563 "assets/extras_home_activated.png" ;

feature assembly F:home.Buttons {
    chapters_selected       F:home.chapters.Selected
    chapters_activated      F:home.chapters.Activated
    extras_selected       F:home.extras.Selected
    extras_activated      F:home.extras.Activated
    play_selected       F:home.play.Selected
    play_activated      F:home.play.Activated
} ;

rc_handler visual R:home
    grid { { chapters extras play } }
    assembly F:home.Buttons
        start_selected true
    select {
        chapters        chapters_selected
        extras        extras_selected
        play        play_selected
    }
    activate {
        chapters        chapters_activated { activate_segment S:chapters ; }
        extras        extras_activated { activate_segment S:extras ; }
        play        play_activated { activate_segment S:home ; }
    }
    mouse {
        chapters        ( 80 523 360 587 )
        extras        ( 400 523 680 587 )
        play        ( 720 523 1067 587 )
    }
;

feature assembly F:chapters.Buttons {
    ch1_selected       F:chapters.ch1.Selected
    ch1_activated      F:chapters.ch1.Activated
    ch2_selected       F:chapters.ch2.Selected
    ch2_activated      F:chapters.ch2.Activated
    home_selected       F:chapters.home.Selected
    home_activated      F:chapters.home.Activated
} ;

rc_handler visual R:chapters
    grid { { ch1 ch2 home } }
    assembly F:chapters.Buttons
        start_selected true
    select {
        ch1        ch1_selected
        ch2        ch2_selected
        home        home_selected
    }
    activate {
        ch1        ch1_activated { activate_segment S:chapters ; }
        ch2        ch2_activated { activate_segment S:chapters ; }
        home        home_activated { activate_segment S:home ; }
    }
    mouse {
        ch1        ( 80 487 320 544 )
        ch2        ( 347 487 587 544 )
        home        ( 880 573 1160 630 )
    }
;

feature assembly F:extras.Buttons {
    gallery_selected       F:extras.gallery.Selected
    gallery_activated      F:extras.gallery.Activated
    credits_selected       F:extras.credits.Selected
    credits_activated      F:extras.credits.Activated
    home_selected       F:extras.home.Selected
    home_activated      F:extras.home.Activated
} ;

rc_handler visual R:extras
    grid { { gallery credits home } }
    assembly F:extras.Buttons
        start_selected true
    select {
        gallery        gallery_selected
        credits        credits_selected
        home        home_selected
    }
    activate {
        gallery        gallery_activated { activate_segment S:extras ; }
        credits        credits_activated { activate_segment S:extras ; }
        home        home_activated { activate_segment S:home ; }
    }
    mouse {
        gallery        ( 80 487 320 544 )
        credits        ( 347 487 587 544 )
        home        ( 880 573 1160 630 )
    }
;

end_show
